MS.S: Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Cmdlets to manage resources in Azure. This module is compatible with PowerShell and Windows PowerShell._x000D__x000A_For more information about the Az module, please visit the following: https://learn.microsoft.com/powershell/azure/

15.4.0 - March 2026_x000D__x000A_Az.Accounts_x000D__x000A_* Updated MSAL to 4.82.1 to fix an issue with ARM endpoint discovery._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Compute_x000D__x000A_* Added '-DiskIOPSReadWrite' and '-DiskMBpsReadWrite' parameters to 'Add-AzVMDataDisk' cmdlet_x000D__x000A_* Added '-Tag' and '-Location' parameters to 'New-AzSshKey' cmdlet_x000D__x000A_* Added '-Tag' parameter to 'Update-AzSshKey' cmdlet_x000D__x000A_* Added support for Disk Availability Policy_x000D__x000A_ - Added '-ActionOnDiskDelay' parameter to 'New-AzDiskConfig' cmdlet to configure disk availability behavior_x000D__x000A_ - Added '-ActionOnDiskDelay' parameter to 'New-AzDiskUpdateConfig' cmdlet to update disk availability behavior_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Databricks_x000D__x000A_* Upgraded API version to 2026-01-01_x000D__x000A_ - Added ComputeMode parameter to New-AzDatabricksWorkspace cmdlet supporting 'Hybrid' and 'Serverless' compute modes_x000D__x000A_ - Changed ComplianceStandard parameter type from enum to String[] for greater flexibility_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.ElasticSan_x000D__x000A_* Supported auto scale when creating and updating an Elastic SAN._x000D__x000A_ - 'New-AzElasticSan'_x000D__x000A_ - 'Update-AzElasticSan'_x000D__x000A_* Supported checking whether disk snapshot backup can be taken for volumes._x000D__x000A_ - 'Test-AzElasticSanVolumeBackup'_x000D__x000A_ - 'Test-AzElasticSanVolumeRestore'_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.KeyVault_x000D__x000A_* Added upcoming breaking change warning messages to 'Get-AzKeyVaultKey' and 'Get-AzKeyVaultSecret' for filtering certificate-backed keys and secrets._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Network_x000D__x000A_* Onboarded 'Microsoft.DataReplication/replicationVaults' to Private Link Common Cmdlets_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Resources_x000D__x000A_* Updated the implementation of -Metadata parameter processing for cmdlets that use it for security. No behavior change._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Sql_x000D__x000A_* Add support for the versionless AKV keys._x000D__x000A_ - The cmdlets supported are 'Add-AzSqlServerKeyVaultKey', 'Get-AzSqlServerKeyVaultKey', 'Set-AzSqlServerTransparentDataEncryptionProtector', 'Get-AzSqlServerTransparentDataEncryptionProtector', 'New-AzSqlDatabase', 'Get-AzSqlDatabase', 'Set-AzSqlDatabase', 'New-AzSqlDatabaseCopy', 'New-AzSqlDatabaseSecondary' and 'Restore-AzSqlDatabase'_x000D__x000A_* Added public preview tag for 'EnableSoftDelete' and 'SoftDeleteRetentionDays' properties in 'New-AzSqlServer' and 'Set-AzSqlServer' cmdlets_x000D__x000A_* Added public preview tag for 'Get-AzSqlDeletedServer' and 'Restore-AzSqlServer' cmdlets_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.StorageAction_x000D__x000A_* Preannounced breaking changes. Please refer to https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2333229

Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Cmdlets to manage resources in Azure. This module is compatible with PowerShell and Windows PowerShell._x000D__x000A_For more information about the Az module, please visit the following: https://learn.microsoft.com/powershell/azure/

15.4.0 - March 2026_x000D__x000A_Az.Accounts_x000D__x000A_* Updated MSAL to 4.82.1 to fix an issue with ARM endpoint discovery._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Compute_x000D__x000A_* Added '-DiskIOPSReadWrite' and '-DiskMBpsReadWrite' parameters to 'Add-AzVMDataDisk' cmdlet_x000D__x000A_* Added '-Tag' and '-Location' parameters to 'New-AzSshKey' cmdlet_x000D__x000A_* Added '-Tag' parameter to 'Update-AzSshKey' cmdlet_x000D__x000A_* Added support for Disk Availability Policy_x000D__x000A_ - Added '-ActionOnDiskDelay' parameter to 'New-AzDiskConfig' cmdlet to configure disk availability behavior_x000D__x000A_ - Added '-ActionOnDiskDelay' parameter to 'New-AzDiskUpdateConfig' cmdlet to update disk availability behavior_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Databricks_x000D__x000A_* Upgraded API version to 2026-01-01_x000D__x000A_ - Added ComputeMode parameter to New-AzDatabricksWorkspace cmdlet supporting 'Hybrid' and 'Serverless' compute modes_x000D__x000A_ - Changed ComplianceStandard parameter type from enum to String[] for greater flexibility_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.ElasticSan_x000D__x000A_* Supported auto scale when creating and updating an Elastic SAN._x000D__x000A_ - 'New-AzElasticSan'_x000D__x000A_ - 'Update-AzElasticSan'_x000D__x000A_* Supported checking whether disk snapshot backup can be taken for volumes._x000D__x000A_ - 'Test-AzElasticSanVolumeBackup'_x000D__x000A_ - 'Test-AzElasticSanVolumeRestore'_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.KeyVault_x000D__x000A_* Added upcoming breaking change warning messages to 'Get-AzKeyVaultKey' and 'Get-AzKeyVaultSecret' for filtering certificate-backed keys and secrets._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Network_x000D__x000A_* Onboarded 'Microsoft.DataReplication/replicationVaults' to Private Link Common Cmdlets_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Resources_x000D__x000A_* Updated the implementation of -Metadata parameter processing for cmdlets that use it for security. No behavior change._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.Sql_x000D__x000A_* Add support for the versionless AKV keys._x000D__x000A_ - The cmdlets supported are 'Add-AzSqlServerKeyVaultKey', 'Get-AzSqlServerKeyVaultKey', 'Set-AzSqlServerTransparentDataEncryptionProtector', 'Get-AzSqlServerTransparentDataEncryptionProtector', 'New-AzSqlDatabase', 'Get-AzSqlDatabase', 'Set-AzSqlDatabase', 'New-AzSqlDatabaseCopy', 'New-AzSqlDatabaseSecondary' and 'Restore-AzSqlDatabase'_x000D__x000A_* Added public preview tag for 'EnableSoftDelete' and 'SoftDeleteRetentionDays' properties in 'New-AzSqlServer' and 'Set-AzSqlServer' cmdlets_x000D__x000A_* Added public preview tag for 'Get-AzSqlDeletedServer' and 'Restore-AzSqlServer' cmdlets_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_Az.StorageAction_x000D__x000A_* Preannounced breaking changes. Please refer to https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2333229
Azure ARM ResourceManager Linux AzureAutomationNotSupported PSModule PSEdition_Core PSEdition_Desktop
